name: Comprehensive Meeting Note
description: A full, well-structured meeting note suitable for archiving to Obsidian.

sections.title: Overview
sections.instruction: Provide a concise executive overview of the meeting: its purpose, who was involved, and the overall outcome.

sections.title: Discussion & Key Topics
sections.instruction: Summarize the main topics discussed, including key arguments, context, and insights, organized topic by topic.

sections.title: Key Decisions
sections.instruction: List the important decisions made during the meeting, each with brief rationale.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List assigned tasks with their owner and due date.

sections.title: Open Questions / Follow-ups
sections.instruction: List unresolved questions and follow-ups from the meeting.
